title: Cassiopea xamachana Cellular Dissociation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dnk7m","text":"This protocol is to optimized to dissociate and fix Cassiopea xamachana cells for cell sorting and scRNA-seq.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2oscd","text":"The dissociation by itself results in 53-55% of viable cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1b6gj","text":"Cells cannot be sorted without fixative, unless your machine can sort a seawater solution. Any other solution will lyse cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"2d8pp","text":"Make sure to work in an RNAse free-environment when able to. Use RNAse-ZAP or work in a UV sterilized hood if possible.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7qlom","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1fl0g","text":"The tissue should be less than 1 cm long ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":41}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Gently wash the jellyfish tissue in 10 mL, Ca-Mg-Free SW for 00:01:00 then transfer to fresh 10 mL, Ca-Mg-Free SW and let incubate at Room temperature for 00:02:30 .
Using sterilized forceps, place the jelly tissue into a clean 15 mL tube then add 1 mL, dissociation mix on top of the jelly, or enough to submerge the tissue.
After the incubation period, filter the sample through a 70 µm, filter Keep sample On ice moving forward.
Centrifuge 350 x g, 4 °C, 7 minutes then carefully discard the supernatant.
Re-suspend the pellet in 800 µL, 1x PBS w/ 1% BSA using gentle pipetting with a wide-bore pipette then add 1 µL, RNA Inhibitor .
Pre-chill chambers of FACS Machine to 4 °C
Sort at the slowest rate (High-purity) with less than 50 PSI at 4 °C . Gate for Calcein Violet (450 nm) and chlorophyll autofluorescence (650-700 nm) for viable jelly cells and symbiont cells.
After sorting, cryopreserve by adding 10 % volume, DMSO and 1 µL, RNA Inhbitor and immediately putting the sample at -80 °C .
Thaw the sample On ice
Centrifuge 350 x g, 4 °C, 7 minutes then carefully remove the supernatant.
Re-suspend the cells in 1 mL, 3.3x PBS w/ 1% BSA then add 1 µL, RNA Inhbitor .
Submit to sequencing center On ice .
Cut the jellyfish tissue with a sterile razor to encourage permeability of reagents.
Incubate the tissue on a rocker for 00:30:00 at room temperature.
Pipette up and down using a wide-bore tip 10 times.
Repeat steps 4 and 5.
Add 80 µL, fetal bovine serum to the cell suspension to create a 8% FBS solution to halt enzyme digestion.
Resuspend in 1000 µL, Ca-Mg-free SW . Gently pipette up and down 10 times with a wide-bore tip to dissociate clumps.
Add 1 micromolar (µM), Calcein Violet 450 AM to cells. Incubate in the dark for 00:30:00 .
After the incubation period, filter the sample through a 70 µm, filter
Resuspend in 500 µL, ACME . Incubate for 00:30:00 .
creator: Victoria Sharp
